questions.question: Explain the difference between a primary key and a foreign key in a database.
questions.hint: Describe the purposes and constraints of both

questions.question: What is the purpose of Normalization in database design? Provide an example of a table that needs to be normalized.
questions.hint: Explain the benefits and describe the normalization process

questions.question: Compare and contrast the uses of Relational and Object-Oriented database management systems.
questions.hint: Describe the key features and application use cases for each type
